title: caladenia minor
intro: Caladenia minor, also known as the Pink Fingers or Pink Midge Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating digestive issues. Caladenia minor can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, the leaves or roots are used in traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
